item.title: 无缝并行开发：使用 Git Worktree 彻底改变您的工作流程 | Parallel Development Made Seamless: Revolutionize Your Workflow with Git Worktree
item.description:
宫樱

发表于 6 月 4 日

在当今快节奏的软件开发环境中，高效协作和简化的工作流程对于团队交付高质量代码至关重要。 其中一个功能是 Git Worktree，这是一种有价值的工具，它使开发人员能够在单个 Git 存储库中管理多个工作树。 在本文中，我们将探讨 Git Worktree 是什么以及为什么它应该成为您的开发工具包的组成部分。

什么是 git 工作树？

简单来说，它使您能够在不同的目录中拥有代码库的多个副本，每个副本都有自己的分支，同时仍然共享相同的底层存储库。

这意味着您可以同时在不同的分支上工作，而无需复杂的分支策略或存储库克隆。

我们为什么要使用它？

有几个令人信服的理由可以说明 Git Worktree 对您的开发工作流程是一个有价值的补充：

  • 无缝分支切换

传统上，切换分支涉及提交或存储更改、切换到所需的分支，然后重新应用更改。

使用 Git Worktree，您可以同时拥有多个工作树，允许您在分支之间切换而无需提交或存储更改，从而节省宝贵的时间并最大限度地减少工作流程的中断。

这种并行开发能力对于处理大型项目的团队特别有利，使开发人员能够隔离他们的更改并独立测试它们，而不会冒无意中影响其他正在进行的工作的风险。

  • 轻量高效

有任何 git worktree 管理器推荐吗？

一个强大的命令行工具@kanamara/wotkree旨在自动化 Git 工作树管理。

主要特征：

  • 无缝创建和删除工作树
  • 有效管理工作树清理
  • 简单的命令和友好的提示
  • 支持多个存储库

一旦暂停，gongsakura 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，gongsakura 将可以再次发表评论和发帖。

一旦取消发布，gongsakura 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 gongsakura 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 gongsakura：

降低 gongsakura 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 gongsakura 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

GongSakura

Posted on Jun 4

In today’s fast-paced software development landscape, efficient collaboration and streamlined workflows are essential for teams to deliver high-quality code. Git, the widely adopted version control system, offers a range of powerful features to support these needs. One such feature is Git Worktree, a valuable tool that enables developers to manage multiple working trees within a single Git repository. In this article, we’ll explore what Git Worktree is and why it should be an integral part of your development toolkit.

What is git worktree?

Git Worktree is a feature introduced in Git 2.5 that allows you to have multiple working trees linked to the same Git repository. In simpler terms, it enables you to have multiple copies of your codebase in separate directories, each with its own branch, while still sharing the same underlying repository.

This means that you can work on different branches simultaneously without the need for complex branching strategies or repository clones.

Why we should use it?

There are several compelling reasons why Git Worktree is a valuable addition to your development workflow:

  • Seamless Branch Switching

Traditionally, switching branches involves either committing or stashing changes, switching to the desired branch, and then reapplying the changes.

With Git Worktree, you can have multiple working trees concurrently, allowing you to switch between branches without the need for committing or stashing changes, saving valuable time and minimizing disruptions to your workflow.

Git Worktree empowers developers to work on multiple features or bug fixes simultaneously by creating separate working trees for each task.

This parallel development capability is especially beneficial for teams working on larger projects, enabling developers to isolate their changes and test them independently, without the risk of inadvertently affecting other ongoing work.

  • Lightweight and Efficient

Git Worktree offers an efficient way to work on different branches by utilizing the same repository objects, saving disk space and reducing the time required for cloning additional copies of the repository.

Rather than maintaining multiple complete copies of the project, Git Worktree shares the repository data, resulting in a lightweight setup that is both resource-friendly and convenient for developers.

Any git worktree manager recommands?

A powerful command-line tool @kanamara/wotkree is designed to automate Git worktree management.

Key features:

  • Seamlessly create and remove worktrees
  • Efficiently Manage Worktree Cleanup
  • Simple commands & Friendly prompts
  • Support multiple repositories

Oscar Sun（孫守真字任真） - Jun 3

Once suspended, gongsakura will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, gongsakura will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by gongsakura will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If gongsakura is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.author: gongsakura

item.title: 如何做出您的第一个开源贡献并获得报酬 | How to Make your first Open Source Contribution and Get Paid
item.description:
洛普瑞特·辛格

发表于 6 月 4 日

在学习“如何编码或编码什么”时，人们经常会遇到这些问题：-

  • 先学什么语言
  • 我应该选修哪门课程
  • 我不自信
  • 选择哪些项目

所有这些问题的出现都是因为我们没有意识到像开源项目这样的好东西。

选择任何语言并从 youtube 上速成课程

  • 不要在课程或视频上花费 3-7 天
  • 在 1-2 天内完成基础知识并跳转到项目

    • 答案是，从

    • 产品搜索
    • 好界
    • 看看人们正在解决什么问题，以及如何从更大的问题中汲取灵感并构建一个项目来解决更小的问题。

      现在，是时候做一些真正的事情了

      • 转到Quine或Good First Issues
      • 在您可以处理的项目中查找初学者问题
      • 确保你在这之前了解 Git 和 Github（也做一个速成班）
      • 现在，是时候加入一个社区了，您可以在该开源项目的存储库中找到该社区并与时间交流
      • 提出疑问，并将一个问题分配给您并开始工作

      您可能会感到沮丧，无法解决问题等。在这种情况下，您可以加入我们的Discord 社区并可以在通用频道中提问。

      如果您在我们的开源项目（初学者友好）中做出贡献，您将获得报酬，并将免费获得指导。

      更多精彩，敬请关注......

    一旦暂停，lovepreetsingh 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，lovepreetsingh 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，lovepreetsingh 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 lovepreetsingh 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 lovepreetsingh：

    降低 lovepreetsingh 发布的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    不屈不挠的 lovepreetsingh 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    Lovepreet Singh

    Posted on Jun 4

    ✨ Open source is like an ocean where there are many gems hidden but very few people dive to find one.

    When it comes to learning "How to code or What to code" People often comes up with these problems:-

    • Which language to learn first
    • Which course should I take
    • I am not feeling confident
    • Which projects to choose

    All of these problems arises because we are not aware about the awesome things like Open Source Projects.

    🔥 If someone wants to learn Programming/Development the best way to do this is:-

    • Pick any language and do a crash course from youtube
    • Don't spend 3-7 days on a course or videos
    • Finish basics under 1-2 days and Jump to the Projects

    😔 Now Problem is How to find projects? And the answer to that is, Get ideas from

    • ProductHunt
    • WellBound
    • Y Combinator

    See, what problems people are solving and how you can take any idea from bigger problems and build a project to solve a smaller problem.

    😎 For Ex:- Instead of building a Whole Hotel Booking website, You can build a booking system only where people can login and book their dates on calender.

    😇 After Building 2-3 smaller projects which will make the Languages and Frameworks on your tips. Now, its time to do some real stuff

    • Go to Quine or Good First Issues
    • Find beginner issues in a project on which you can work
    • Make sure you know Git and Github before this (Do a crash course on it too)
    • Now, it's the time to Join a community which you can find in the Repository of that Open Source Project and communicate with time
    • Ask doubts, and make one issue assigned to you and start working

    😅 Things to Remember:-

    You might feel demotivated, not able to solve an issue etc. In that case you can Join our Discord Community and can ask doubts in the general channel.

    And If you will make contributions in our Open Source Project (Beginner friendly) You will get Paid, and will get Guidance for free.

    Much more to come, Follow for more....

    Once suspended, lovepreetsingh will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, lovepreetsingh will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by lovepreetsingh will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If lovepreetsingh is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag lovepreetsingh:

    Make all posts by lovepreetsingh less visible

    lovepreetsingh consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging lovepreetsingh will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: lovepreetsingh

item.title: 我厌倦了听到关于远程工作的陈词滥调 | I am tired of hearing banalities about remote working
item.description:
大脑库

发表于 6 月 4 日

这篇文章之前托管在 brainrepo.dev 上，写于 2023 年 1 月 30 日下午 03:57。

我在这里表达的所有意见都是我的。 如您所知，我一直在一家完全远程的科技公司工作，我喜欢这样做！

我非常冷静和适度地解释和分享我的观点，但是当我读到轻视重要话题的陈述时，我会失去自制力和愤怒。

这就是几天前阅读 LinkedIn 上的一篇帖子时发生的事情。

但是让我们一个一个地看那些废话。

想一想：世界不是由远程办公的人建立的……我们想发明和试验新的工作方式。 因为，是的，世界正在发生变化……我们希望在当地培训年轻人参与我们的业务。 我们希望为我们的客户服务。 我们想在一个可能有点嘈杂但充满生活气息的开放空间里分享技术意见……我们想握手。 我们想嘲笑咖啡机。 我们不希望这种孤立人们的“趋势”。 再也不出家门，真是悲哀的缘分！ 锁在家里……没有电子手环……随便吧🤔……所以，是的，我可能会再一次推开“charentaise”卖家和“pilou pilou pyjama”供应商。

我们****要回归现实生活了。

如果你喜欢隐居、在线订购和在元宇宙中以化身的身份生活，我想我们永远不会见面，这当然不是一件坏事！

好的，首先，深呼吸，

世界在变化，人们的互动方式也在变化，我不是 100% 的数字生活粉丝，但我希望在数字和物理部分之间取得良好的平衡。 如您所见，我不谈论现实生活，因为现实生活也包含数字化的一面！

这是什么意思？ 您的客户需要您的实际存在。 为什么？ 你的身体能给顾客更多的是什么(😂)？

我认为您的客户更喜欢您的关注、敏感度、耐心、专业知识、实用主义和有效性。

我们可以在网络摄像头前（强制开启）或通过一封写得很好的电子邮件，通过诚实的沟通、承诺和同理心来给予一切！

你知道，作为一家完全偏远的公司，我们可以扩大这一点，因为在渠道中，你会看到真正的多样性，来自不同地方的人，不同宗教或性别的人带着尊重、快乐和开放的心态一起说话。

我出生在撒丁岛中心的一个小村庄。 告诉我什么时候我能有这样的机会！ 感谢远程工作，我有这个机会并全力捍卫它！

谈到机会，在没有远程工作的世界里，一个男人/女孩如何在不住在他/她的家乡的情况下为一家国际公司工作并成为全球影响力的一部分？ 这有很大的影响，你知道吗？ 小村庄正在消亡，随之而来的人们正在牺牲他们的生活质量！

我们想嘲笑咖啡机。”

在咖啡机前构建的关系有多牢固？

质量而不是数量决定了我们关系的力量。

我刚刚从一家非常紧张的公司退休回来，参加了一些帮助我达到极限的活动，我很确定我与同事分享的经验比多年的咖啡机时间更强大！ 见一次面就可以称他们为朋友了！

这些共享的经验对于专业的远程工作是必要的，而且不仅如此。

我们****要回归现实生活了。

如果你喜欢隐居、在线订购和在元宇宙中以化身的身份生活，我想我们永远不会见面，这当然不是一件坏事！

我并不孤立。 我很遥远，但与世界相连。

如果我带着电子手环生活，我很高兴拥有它，因为我的监狱就是整个世界！

我去睡觉了。 再见！

一旦暂停，brainrepo 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，brainrepo 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，brainrepo 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 brainrepo 没有暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 brainrepo 的方法：

降低 brainrepo 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging brainrepo will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning brainrepo 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

BrainRepo

Posted on Jun 4

This article was previously hosted on brainrepo.dev and was written on January 30, 2023, at 03:57 PM.

All opinions I express here are my ones.*

As you know, I’ve been working for a full-remote tech company, and I love to do it!

I explain and share my opinion very calmly and moderately, but when I read statements that trivialize crucial topics, I lose self-control and rage.

That’s what happened a few days ago reading a post on LinkedIn.

But let’s see those bullshit one by one.

Come to think of it: the world is not built by people teleworking… We want to invent and experiment with new ways of working. Because, yes, the world is changing… We want to train young people in our business on the ground. We want to be there for our customers. We want to share technical opinions in an open space that may be a little noisy but is full of life… We want to shake hands. We want to laugh at the coffee machine. We don’t want this “trend” that isolates people. It is a sad fate to don’t leave your home anymore! Locked up at home… without an electronic bracelet… whatever 🤔… So, yes, once again, I may push away the “charentaise” sellers and the “pilou pilou pyjama” suppliers.

We at **** are going back to real life.

And if you like living into cloistering, ordering online and living as an avatar in the metaverse, I think we’ll never meet, and that’s certainly not a bad thing!

Ok, firstly, a deep breath,

the world is changing, and how people interact also, I am not a 100% digital life fan, but I am for a good balance between the digital and physical parts. As you see, I don’t speak about real life because real life also contains a digital side!

“We want to be there for our customers”

what does it mean? Your customer needs your physical presence. Why? What can your body give more to your customer (😂)?

I think your customer prefers your attention, sensitivity, patience, expertise, pragmatism and effectiveness.

We can give all things with honest communication, commitment and empathy in front of a webcam (mandatorily on) or with a well-written email!

“We want to share technical opinions in an open space that may be a little noisy but is full of life.”

Hei man, if you would see our slack channels, where hundreds of people share opinions, experiences and their pets’ photos, you would understand. And you know, being a fully remote company allows us to amplify that because, in the channel, you see the true diversity, people from different places, with various religions or gender speaking together with respect, pleasure and open-mindedness.

I was born in a little village in the centre of Sardinia. Say to me when I could have had such an opportunity! Thanks to remote working, I have this opportunity and defend it with all my might!

Speaking about the opportunity, in a world without remote working, how a guy/girl can work for an international company and be part of a global impact without living in his/her hometown? This has a significant effect, you know? Little villages are dying, and people following the occasion are sacrificing their quality of life!

“We want to shake hands. We want to laugh at the coffee machine.”

How strong are the relations constructed in front of the coffee machine?

Quality rather than quantity determines the power of our relationships.

I am just coming back from a very intense company retirement with activities that helped me reach my limits, and I am pretty sure that the experiences I shared with my colleagues are stronger than years of coffee machine times! I can call them friends after seeing them just one time!

These shared experiences are necessary for professional remote working and not only that.

We at **** are going back to real life.

And if you like living into cloistering, ordering online and living as an avatar in the metaverse, I think we’ll never meet, and that’s certainly not a bad thing!

I am not isolated. I am remote and connected to the world.

If I am living with an electronic bracelet, I am happy to have it because my jail is the entire world!

Ps: There are another thousand good reasons why remote working well-made is a good thing, but I am nervous, tired, and at midnight. I’m going to bed. See you!

John Owolabi Idogun - Jun 4

Once suspended, brainrepo will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, brainrepo will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by brainrepo will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If brainrepo is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag brainrepo:

Make all posts by brainrepo less visible

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging brainrepo will restore default visibility to their posts.
